title: Yaaro Yaarukkul Song Lyrics Chennai 28
stanzas:
Yaaro yaarukkul ingu yaaro
yaar nenjai ingu
yaar thanthaaro
vidaiyilaa oru kelvi
(uyir kadhal oru velvi) (2)

kadhal varam naan vaanga
kadai kangal nee veesa
kokkai pola naal thorim
otrai kaalil nindren kanmani.

Yaaro yaarukkul ingu yaaro
yaar nenjai ingu
yaar thanthaaro
vidaiyilaa oru kelvi
(uyir kadhal oru velvi)

oorai vellum thogai nane
unnal indru thotru ponen
kannaal yuththame
seithaai nithamae

oh ho ho ho
nindraai ingu minnal
keetraai
nitham vaangum moochu
kaatraai
unnai soolgiren naan
unnai soolgiren

kaatril vaitha soodam pole
kadhal theerndhu pogaathu
unnai neengi
ushnam thaangi
ennaal vazha aagaathu
anbae vaa...

Yaaro yaarukkul ingu yaaro
yaar nenjai ingu
yaar thanthaaro
vidaiyilaa oru kelvi
(uyir kadhal oru velvi)

unthan aadai kayapodu
ungal veetu kambi kodiiyaai
ennai enninen naan
thavam panninen

ketta ketta vaarthai solli
kitta kitta vanthaai thulli
etti poividu illai
yedho aaividum

aasai vellam
paayum podhu
vanga kadalum
vaaikaal thaan
anbae vaa

Yaaro yaarukkul ingu yaaro
yaar nenjai ingu
yaar thanthaaro
vidaiyilaa oru kelvi
(uyir kadhal oru velvi) (2)

kadhal varam naan vaanga
kadai kangal nee veesa
kokkai pola naal thorim
otrai kaalil nindren kanmani.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Yaaro Yaarukkul explores themes of love and connection, asking questions about relationships and emotions.

How does this song fit into the plot of Chennai 28?

This song reflects the youthful exuberance and romantic entanglements of the characters in Chennai 28.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of K.S. Chitra and SPB.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Yaaro Yaarukkul was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was this song released?

The song was released on February 22, 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaaro Yaarukkul, the characters express their feelings of love and curiosity about relationships, making it a perfect romantic anthem. The song's melody, combined with the heartfelt lyrics by Vaali, evokes a sense of nostalgia and happiness. It beautifully captures the essence of youthful love, making it relatable for many. The collaboration between K.S. Chitra and SPB adds a magical touch, making this song a memorable part of the Chennai 28 soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaaro Yaarukkul from the movie Chennai 28 is a delightful duet that captures the essence of youthful romance. With the enchanting voices of K.S. Chitra and SPB, paired with Yuvan's captivating music, this song is sure to evoke fond memories. Dive into a melodic journey that beautifully portrays love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Who is here, who is in the heart, who has given this question, is there a question in the end? (Life's love is a burden)
I have come to receive the blessing of love, you are like a beautiful flower, I stand here on this day, my dear.
I am the one who will conquer the town, today I have come to you, you have always fought with your eyes.
Oh ho ho ho, you stand here like lightning, always bringing the breeze, I am calling you, I am calling you.
Like the heat that is trapped in the air, love cannot fade away, you cannot escape, my dear, come...
Your dress is like a flag at your house, I have suffered for you, I have endured.
You came here saying bad words, you came here and flew away, there is nothing left.
When love speaks, Chennai and Tamil become one.
When desires flow like water, come, love is always there, my dear, come.
I have come to receive the blessing of love, you are like a beautiful flower, I stand here on this day, my dear.
